chapter_title.en: The Dislike of Sleeping After the Fajr Prayer

text: 1443 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ رَأَيْتُمُوهُ نَائِماً عَلَى وَجْهِهِ فَأَنْبِهُوهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1443 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"If you see someone sleeping on their face, wake them up."
